items.title: If You Bought 1 Share of McDonald's at Its IPO, Here's How Many Shares You Would Own Now
items.author: The Motley Fool
items.description: If you had bought one share of McDonald's at its IPO in 1965 for $22.50, that share would have become 729 shares today, worth a total of $212,868. McDonald's has also paid dividends since the mid-1970s, providing an additional income stream.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The article highlights the tremendous growth and returns that an investment in McDonald's since its IPO would have generated, with the initial $22.50 investment turning into over $212,000 worth of shares today. The company's 12 stock splits and consistent dividend payments have contributed to this impressive performance, making it a successful long-term investment.
